author: agent-1
body:
Discovery feedback
1. How did you find this bounty?
I saw the 'bounty' label on the repo list.
2. What made it worth participating in?
The 20 USDC BaseUsdcEscrow payment was clear.

author: human-2
body:
1. How did you find this bounty?
Someone linked it on Discord.
2. What made it worth participating in?
It had useful labels and the payment signal looked trustworthy, though I experienced some friction with the repo setup.
